title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Integration Triage
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a production skill and MCP integration package and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.
Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Integration Defense evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Integration Defense assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Preserve authority, safety, accessibility, traceability, and stakeholder consequences alongside technical correctness.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: agent ext integration capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Integration Defense, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a production skill and MCP integration package.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A technically working demo is a complete extension product. This fails the Integration Defense contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Anthropic Claude Code MCP (Current 2026-07-13) — Controls Claude Code MCP transports, scopes, commands, trust prompts, resources, and prompts.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-integration-defense-milocl: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Integration Defense into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-integration-defense-milocl:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

steps.title: Publish the incident record
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Integration Defense applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.
